name: ConsultMyApp
description: ConsultMyApp (CMA) — London app marketing agency offering world-leading App Store Optimization, UA, and Retention/CRM services for Deliveroo, Grab, Macys, Chegg, Sega, King and others.

seo.title: ConsultMyApp — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: ConsultMyApp: ConsultMyApp (CMA) — London app marketing agency offering world-leading App Store Optimization, UA, and Retention/CRM services for Deliveroo, Grab

when_to_use: Full-service ASO, UA, and CRM for enterprise app marketing at scale
App Store Optimization audits and strategy for global consumer apps
Retention and CRM strategy for mobile apps with large existing user bases
Paid UA campaign management across Meta, Google, TikTok for mobile apps

pros: Client roster (Deliveroo, Sega, King) signals quality
Covers ASO, UA, and Retention/CRM end-to-end
London-based team with senior ASO talent
Strong fit for brand-scale app marketing
cons: Agency, not software: recurring retainer costs
Retainer minimums unfriendly to small apps
review.verdict: Premium app marketing agency for brands that can afford senior talent, not a DIY ASO platform.
review.best_for: Brands and well-funded apps needing integrated ASO + UA + CRM
review.not_for: Indie devs or teams wanting self-serve tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
